rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM F. STROBRIDGE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to december 19, 2018 for proper notice. the proof of service filed is for a Notice of Hearing, DE-120. Form DE-121 is a mandatory form that must be used for a petition for letters. new notice is required. all issues must be resolved with copies and the proposed order delivered to the probate examiner in Room 202 no later than friday, december 14, 2018 in order to avoid an automatic continuance.
